overview.description: Czech internet portal, search engine, and AI assistant platform — the most visited web destination in the Czech Republic
overview.description_long: Founded in 1996 by Ivo Lukačovič, Seznam.cz is the Czech Republic's original and most visited internet portal. It operates 30+ services including a search engine, email (Email.cz), maps (Mapy.com), news (Novinky.cz, Seznam Zprávy), video (Stream.cz), e-commerce (Sbazar.cz, Kupi.cz), classifieds (Sreality.cz), and its own TV channel (Televize Seznam). The company invests heavily in AI research: it has built 'Seznam AI', an AI-powered assistant surfacing search summaries and contextual information, and employs researchers in NLP, speech synthesis, generative language models, and ML recommendations. Its Sklik platform is the leading Czech programmatic ad network.
overview.tagline: Jsme česká internetová jednička — Czech internet's number one

history.origin_story: Founded by Ivo Lukačovič in Prague in 1996 with 50,000 CZK of personal savings as the first Czech web directory and search engine. Grew into the dominant Czech internet portal before Google eroded its search share. In 2000, Swedish Spray International acquired ~30% stake. Lukačovič regained majority control in 2003 and has retained it since via Masaryk Holding.

key_milestones.event: Founded by Ivo Lukačovič as first Czech web directory and search engine
Spray International (Sweden) invested, Seznam becomes joint-stock company
Lukačovič regains majority control, replaces third-party search with own engine
Deployed own fulltext search engine; acquired Email.cz
Moved HQ to Anděl (Radlická), Prague; Pavel Zima becomes CEO
Mapy.com adopted IndexNow protocol for search indexing
Launched Seznam AI assistant with generative search summaries

financials.revenue_source: Wikipedia (2014 data): 3.129 billion CZK operating revenue

open_roles.title: Výzkumník strojového učení pro zpracování řeči
Python programátor Lide.cz – vývojář doporučování a ML klasifikátorů
Ranking Product Manager pro AI Asistenta a vyhledávání

risk_assessment.agi_displacement_rationale: Seznam's core search and news aggregation face ongoing commoditization pressure from global AI (Google AI Overviews, ChatGPT) but its moat is Czech-language expertise, local brand trust, proprietary datasets (maps, classifieds, email), and a vertically integrated ad network (Sklik). Its own generative AI research and 'Seznam AI' assistant show active investment to compete.
risk_assessment.market_risk_rationale: Czech search market has been eroded by Google (74% share by 2018 vs. Seznam's ~26%). However, Seznam still dominates Czech-language content, e-commerce, classifieds, and local media. Revenue remains substantial (3B+ CZK). The market is real and established; the risk is competitive pressure from global tech platforms rather than market size.
risk_assessment.funding_risk_rationale: Privately held company with ~3B CZK revenue (2014), owned by controlling shareholder Ivo Lukačovič via Masaryk Holding. No external funding dependence, no runway risk, self-sustaining through advertising and e-commerce revenue for nearly 30 years.
risk_assessment.overall_risk_rationale: Established enterprise with strong Czech market position, proprietary tech, and active AI investment — but faces structural headwinds as Google consolidates Czech search and global AI platforms erode the value of content aggregation. Long-term relevance requires successful AI differentiation in Czech language and local services.

metadata.notes: Revenue data only available for 2014 (3.129B CZK from Wikipedia; LinkedIn confirms similar figure). Employees_exact of 1,900 is from the 2026 about page ('více než 1 900 Seznamáků'). LinkedIn shows 1,001-5,000 range. Glassdoor blocked anti-bot protection; rating not retrieved. Business model is advertising-based (Sklik PPC platform) + e-commerce — classified as 'other' since it does not fit any single SaaS/consulting enum. Parent is Masaryk Holding controlled by founder Ivo Lukačovič.
